title: MrGoat2K's Yummy
description: Adds new types of food, drinks, decor blocks and more.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YUYkBJj5/images/9dac558b58b6210938c92255d3c22962889f3319.png)
**About:**

Exploring all the food and drink presented in the mod, you'll have to use a variety of appliances ranging from a kitchen knife to a fully working gas stove. Additionally, there will be some decorating blocks and even new structures in the game.

To explore the mod you will need a cookbook. It works on [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli), which is a required installation. Using the cookbook you can easily learn all the basic mechanics of the mod.
